title: Grit Studio Run Generator Port Boundary
forbids: Studio Run in Game bypassing the manifest-only generated-mod port or passing request realization side channels into generation
why: Packet 10 makes generation a single manifest handoff: the workflow writes one request-workspace manifest, calls the generator port with that manifest reference, and records the generated mod as private runtime evidence.
remediate: Keep generateRunInGameMod as the only Studio generator port, call it with the StudioRunGenerationManifestReference, and implement the app port by invoking the Swooper manifest generator from generationManifest.path.
message: Studio Run in Game generator port boundary drifted.
